items.title: Differentiable Logic Gate Networks for Low-Latency EEG Classification on Edge Devices
items.abstract: Real-time EEG classification on edge devices is bottlenecked by the floating-point arithmetic of conventional neural networks. We investigated Differentiable Logic Gate Networks (Diff-Logic) as a hard

items.title: SLAM in Low-Light Environments: Project Report
